name: Sherilyn's Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef and set aside.
2. Brown the sausage separately and thinly slice it. Return the sliced sausage to the pan with the beef.
3. Add onion, green pepper, and minced garlic to the pan; sauté until translucent.
4. Add tomato sauce and chopped tomatoes, along with basil, oregano, bay leaves, and sugar. Stir to combine.
5. Simmer the mixture, partially covered, for approximately 1 hour or until thickened.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. In a 13 x 9 x 2-inch glass baking dish, spread half of the sauce on the bottom.
8. Alternate layers with lasagna noodles, Parmesan cheese, mozzarella cheese, ricotta cheese, and tomato-meat sauce.
9. Top with remaining ingredients, including extra Parmesan and mozzarella cheese.
10. Bake uncovered for approximately 30 minutes or until heated through.
Note: Adjust spices to taste, favoring more basil and less oregano. This recipe freezes well and serves 6-8 people.
